title: PRIMER TURNO
description: A teenager embarks on a new path and finds himself in a complicated situation.

sentences.translation: I don't want to be here...
No... No. But I learn quickly.

sentences.text: La ensalada y el pollo, por favor...
sentences.translation: The salad and the chicken please.

sentences.text: Y para mí, la hamburguesa... y las patatas fritas.
sentences.translation: And for me, the hamburger and chips.

sentences.text: Una ensalada y pollo, hamburguesa y patatas fritas, vino tinto y una cerveza.
sentences.translation: A salad and chicken, hamburger and chips, red wine and a beer...

sentences.text: Sí, señora, estaré con usted en breve...
sentences.translation: Yes, madam, I'll be with you shortly...
What are you going to order?

sentences.text: Para la mesa tres, no la mesa seis...
sentences.translation: For table three, not table six...
